name: Mississippi
why_ruby_pro: ABC dry county enforcement built into every order and delivery route
Mississippi Code Title 67 excise tax calculations automated on all transactions
Wet, dry, and local-option territory rules tracked automatically across the state
problem: Dry county boundaries and local option rules managed manually across your routes
Title 67 ABC compliance assembled from disconnected data with every filing cycle
Rapid county-by-county legalization changes creating compliance blind spots
difference: Auto-enforce dry and wet county restrictions on every order before delivery
Built-in ABC compliance reporting directly from your live transaction data
Stay current as Mississippi counties shift from dry to wet without manual updates
how_it_works: Every account geo-tagged with current dry/wet status and ABC license class
One-click Title 67 excise reports generated from actual orders and inventory
See route profitability and account health across all Mississippi territories
